GridDB v4 Distribution
======================
One file. Drop it. Unpack it. Use it.

1. Unpack:
   python3 griddb_pack.py unpack griddb-v4.grid ./griddb/

2. Use:
   cd griddb
   python3 -c "from binary_grid_db import Encoder; print('GridDB ready')"

The 616KB archive contains 11 source files including the unpacker itself.
